Artículos publicados

2025

2024

  • de Vries E, Calvache JA, Hernández Zambrano SM (2024). Role of caregivers being trained in assisting in end of life care – Latin American perspective. Current Opinion in Supportive & Palliative Care 2024. doi:10.1097/SPC.0000000000000730

  • McConnell T, Mendieta CV, de Vries E, et al (2024). Developing research priorities for palliative care in Colombia: a priority setting partnership approach. BMC Palliat Care 2024;23:194. doi:10.1186/s12904-024-01534-z

  • Mendieta CV, Calvache JA, Rondón MA, Rincón-Rodríguez CJ, Ahmedzai SH, de Vries E (2024). Validation of the Spanish translation Sheffield Profile for Assessment and Referral for Care (SPARC-Sp) at the Hospital Universitario San Jose of Popayan, Colombia. Palliative and Supportive Care 2024;1-12. doi:10.1017/S1478951524000476

  • Moreno S, Mendieta CV, de Vries E, et al (2024). Translation and linguistic validation of the Sheffield Profile for Assessment and Referral for Care (SPARC) to Colombian Spanish. Palliative and Supportive Care 2024;1-10. doi:10.1017/S1478951524000038

2023

  • Mendieta CV, de Vries E, Gomez-Neva ME, et al (2023). Barriers and facilitators to palliative care for patients with non-curable cancer in Colombia: perspectives of allied health and social care professionals. BMC Palliat Care 2023;22:149. doi:10.1186/s12904-023-01267-5

  • Moreno S, Medina-Rico M, Osorio Clavijo K, Rodríguez NA, Vicuña Jiménez VM, Calvache JA, De Vries E (2023). End of Life in Patients With Advanced Non-curable Cancer: Patient Considerations Around the Moment of Death. OMEGA - Journal of Death and Dying 2023;0. doi:10.1177/00302228231190240

  • Arango-Gutiérrez A, Moreno S, Rondón M, et al (2023). Factors associated with suffering from dying in patients with cancer: a cross-sectional analytical study among bereaved caregivers. BMC Palliat Care 2023;22:48. doi:10.1186/s12904-023-01148-x

2022

  • Arroyo Castillo L, Arango-Gutiérrez A, De Vries E (2022). End of life of the cancer patient: patient, family and physician perceptions. Colomb. J. Anesthesiol. 2022;50:e1024. doi:10.5554/22562087.e1024

  • Medina-Rico M, Osorio Clavijo K, Rodríguez NA, Vicuña Jiménez VM, Leal F, Calvache JA, Moreno S, De Vries E (2022). Fin de vida en pacientes con cáncer no curable. Percepciones de los pacientes sobre el sistema de salud. Rev Gerenc Polit Salud 2022;21. doi:10.11144/Javeriana.rgps21.fvpc

  • Arroyo LI, Ortega-Lenis D, Ardila L, Leal F, Morales O, Calvache JA, De Vries E (2022). Percepciones médicas sobre la atención en el final de la vida en pacientes oncológicos. Rev Gerenc Polit Salud 2022;21. doi:10.11144/Javeriana.rgps21.pmaf

2021

  • de Vries E, Leal Arenas FA, van der Heide A, et al (2021). Medical decisions concerning the end of life for cancer patients in three Colombian hospitals – a survey study. BMC Palliat Care 2021;20:161. doi:10.1186/s12904-021-00853-9

  • Reid J, de Vries E, Ahmedzai SH, Arias-Rojas M, Calvache JA, Gómez-Sarmiento SC, Gomez ML, Parra-Cubides SL, Prue G, Moreno S (2021). Palliative care and oncology in Colombia: the potential of integrated care delivery. Healthcare 2021;9:789. doi:10.3390/healthcare9070789

  • Calvache JA, Moreno S, Prue G, et al (2021). Knowledge of end-of-life wishes by physicians and family caregivers in cancer patients. BMC Palliat Care 2021;20:140. doi:10.1186/s12904-021-00823-1

  • Luna-Meza A, Godoy-Casasbuenas N, Calvache JA, et al (2021). Decision making in the end-of-life care of patients who are terminally ill with cancer – a qualitative descriptive study with a phenomenological approach from the experience of healthcare workers. BMC Palliat Care 2021;20:76. doi:10.1186/s12904-021-00768-5

  • De Vries E, Vergara-García OE, Karduss-Preciado S, Baquero Castro V, Prieto Rodríguez S, Sánchez Forero M, et al (2021). The financial impact of a terminal cancer on patient′s families in Colombia – A survey study. Journal of Cancer Policy 2021;28:100272. doi:10.1016/j.jcpo.2021.100272

  • De Vries E, Velásquez M, Espejo A, Navarrete F, Robledo S, Salazar M, Baquero P, Buesaquillo C, Arango L, Burbano L, Andrade L, Calvache JA (2021). Conocimientos acerca de la eutanasia en estudiantes universitarios en dos instituciones de educación superior en Colombia. Univ. Med. 2021;62. URL

2020

2018

  • Poster 12th World Research Congress of the EAPC 2022 ID P03:31. Knowledge of end-of-life wishes by physicians and family caregivers in cancer patients. Palliative Medicine 2022;36(S1). doi:10.1177/02692163221093145
